overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Weston Public Works & Utility Committee was scheduled to meet on July 13, 2026, to review capital improvement projects, street and utility operations updates, and consider several infrastructure matters including surveying services for Howland Avenue, street light installation, and bid results for Concord Avenue reconstruction. The meeting was also noticed as a special assessment hearing.

agenda.item: Approval of 6/8/26 Public Works & Utility Committee Minutes
Acknowledge June 2026 Water and Sewer Permits

discussions.item: Approval of 6/8/26 Public Works & Utility Committee Minutes
discussions.body: The committee was scheduled to approve the minutes from the June 8, 2026 meeting of the Public Works & Utility Committee.

discussions.item: Acknowledge June 2026 Water and Sewer Permits
discussions.body: The committee was set to acknowledge water and sewer permits issued during June 2026.
The committee was scheduled to receive an update on the Capital Improvement Plan from Public Works Director Michael Wodalski.
The committee was expected to receive a report on street operations activities and projects.
The committee was scheduled to receive an update on utility operations and activities.
The committee was set to review and consider quotes for surveying services related to Howland Avenue.
The committee was scheduled to discuss street light installation plans and considerations.
The committee was expected to review bid results for the Concord Avenue reconstruction project.
The committee was set to discuss and consider future projects for inclusion in the Capital Improvement Plan.

publicComment: Public comment was on the agenda as item 5.
actionItems: Expected to acknowledge June 2026 water and sewer permits
Set to review and consider Howland Avenue surveying services quotes
Scheduled to discuss street light installation
Expected to review Concord Avenue reconstruction bid results
Set to consider future Capital Improvement Plan projects
title: Public Works Committee - 7/13/2026
